response_text:
GitHub authentication failed. We need to set up Git access.

Do you have GitHub credentials configured on this Mac? Try:

```bash
git push -u origin main
```

It will prompt for username and password/token. Use your GitHub username and a Personal Access Token (not your password).

Or if you have SSH keys set up, we can switch to SSH:

```bash
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:dptekippe/roger-mirror.git
```

Can you push manually, or do you need help setting up credentials?
